## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
A contact lens delivery service that emphasizes speed and convenience — same-day delivery straight to the customer&#39;s door, even on Shabbat and Jewish holidays.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
